notes: Blind single-company menu for SBUX. All 72 events reviewed in order (14 earnings 8-K press releases, 10-Q/10-K MD&A and Risk Factors, 13 transcripts); item-only 8-K stubs had no usable text. All 18 fiscal.ai KPI labels were rewritten or explicitly skipped.
Evidence quotes are verbatim substrings of the event content (including curly quotes where the source uses them); KPI rows quote the raw fiscal.ai label.

Shared-quote splits per R2 (two causal variables in one sentence): revenue_guidance + eps_guidance share one transcript quote; china_competition + china_consumer_spending share one 8-K quote; interest_rate + government_shutdown share one 10-Q quote.

16 skipped: KPI 'All Other International Company-Operated Stores' (residual bucket, vague); KPI 'Siren Retail - International Company-Operated Stores' (deduped into siren_retail_store_count); 'Leadership Experience 2025' (single-instance, period token); 'Back to Starbucks' strategy name (company name + program instance; its components coined as store_partner_wages, store_labor_hours, restructuring_costs, store_closures, advertising_spend, green_apron_service_model, menu_simplification, cost_savings_program); 'Reinvention Plan'/'Triple Shot' strategy names (same reason); logistics costs (deduped into supply_chain_cost); in-app promotions (deduped into promotional_activity); China price wars (deduped into china_competition); revenue_surprise (no metric-specific vs-consensus quote found); climate change (too diffuse boilerplate); Russian invasion of Ukraine (single-instance event); Starbucks Odyssey (vague mention); health-and-wellness trends (vague category); value perception (deduped into brand_value/pricing); guidance suspension (state of the guidance drivers, not a separate cause); third place positioning (vague brand concept).

Renames to satisfy naming rules: 'general and administrative costs' -> general_administrative_costs (glue word 'and' banned); ROIC kept as acronym roic ('return_on_invested_capital' contains glue words); 'ceo transition' -> ceo_succession ('transition' banned); KPI 'Growth' suffixes stripped (banned state word).
